assertions.title: Enter on directory emits touch-and-cd script

steps.action: Create temp dir with 2025-01-15-alpha and 2025-02-20-beta entries

steps.expected: stdout contains warning comment, touch, cd; exit 0
steps.observed: stdout: '# if you can read this...' + touch + echo + cd; exit code 0

assertions.title: ESC and Ctrl-C cancel with exit code 1
Symlink entries show link icon and resolve to realpath

steps.action: Create temp dir with real-target-dir and symlink 2025-04-01-mylink -> real-target-dir
Run lab exec --path $TEST_DIR --and-exit and check stderr for 🔗
Run lab exec --path $TEST_DIR --and-keys='ENTER' and check stdout for realpath

assertions.title: Create new appears when input non-empty

steps.expected: stderr contains 📂 icon, 'Create new' text, and YYYY-MM-DD prefix
steps.observed: stderr shows '📂 Create new: 2026-04-13-newtest' at end of list

assertions.title: Create new absent when input empty

steps.action: Create temp dir with 2025-01-15-alpha and 2025-02-20-beta entries

steps.expected: No 📂 icon or 'Create new' in stderr
steps.observed: No 📂 icon or 'Create new' text found in output

assertions.title: Selecting create new emits mkdir script

steps.expected: stdout contains mkdir -p with YYYY-MM-DD-newproject, cd, exit 0
steps.observed: stdout: mkdir -p .../2026-04-13-newproject + touch + echo + cd; exit 0

assertions.title: Spaces in create name converted to dashes

steps.observed: stdout contains .../2026-04-13-my-project; no spaces in path

assertions.title: Create-new in git-backed labs emits worktree script

steps.action: Create temp dir, git init, git commit --allow-empty
steps.expected: Git repo initialized with initial commit
stdout contains 'git worktree add --detach' with dated path
steps.observed: stdout contains 'worktree add --detach .../2026-04-13-newfeature' inside sh -c wrapper

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed. All TUI selection and create-new behaviors work as specified.
